gameModeSelect.title: Choose Game Mode
gameModeSelect.subtitle: How do you want to play?
gameModeSelect.joinGameDesc: Enter a code to join someone else's game.
gameModeSelect.createGameDesc: Create a room and invite others to join.

joinGame.title: Join game
joinGame.subtitle: Enter the room code or scan the host's QR code.
joinGame.comingSoonMessage: Online multiplayer will be available in a future update.

createGame.title: Create game
createGame.subtitle: Share this code or QR code so others can join.
createGame.hint: Others can scan this QR code or enter the code to join.
createGame.comingSoonMessage: Online multiplayer will be available in a future update.

howToPlay.title: How to Play
howToPlay.step1: Add players – enter each person's name and pick an avatar.
howToPlay.step2: Choose a category – pick the theme for this round.
howToPlay.step3: Take turns – play goes in the order you added players.
howToPlay.step4: Truth or Dare – when it's your turn, pick one and complete the challenge!
howToPlay.noteText:
Access even more questions
and categories with in-app purchases!

addPlayers.subtitle: Enter a name and pick an avatar to continue.

categories.title: Select a Category
categories.lockedMessage: This category is locked for now. Visit the shop to unlock it.

shop.title: Shop
shop.premiumDesc: Unlock all premium categories. Best value!

game.tapToReveal: Tap TRUTH or DARE to reveal a question.
game.exitMenuA11y: Menu to exit or go back

exitMenu.title: End the round?
exitMenu.subtitle: Choose what you'd like to do.

exitConfirm.title: Exit game
exitConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to close the game?
